video_job.actor_prompt: Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall, warm wooden interior, lively background. Natsu Moonvale, an androgynous ranger with a green half-cape and leaf-shaped brooch, stands facing Natsu Ashbell, a feminine frontline adventurer in reinforced leather armor with a bright scarf. Moonvale holds a sealed quest parcel with both hands, extending it toward Ashbell in a clear, deliberate handoff motion. Cinematic lighting, soft focus, no text, no watermark.
video_job.target_continuation_prompt: Same continuous guild hall shot. Natsu Ashbell accepts the sealed quest parcel from Natsu Moonvale. Both characters perform a slight, respectful bow to each other as the handoff completes. Warm anime RPG lighting, consistent character appearance and attire, fluid motion, no text, no watermark.
video_job.safety_notes: The prompts depict a professional, non-sexual interaction between two fantasy characters. No text, watermarks, or inappropriate content are included.

timeline_story.story_verb: completed a visible quest handoff with
timeline_story.selection_reason: Natsu Moonvale hands the charged mana crystal to Natsu Ashbell to ensure the expedition party receives it for the sealed gate.

relationship_adjustments.reason: Successful coordination on a critical expedition task builds mutual professional trust.
Reliable handoff of essential gear strengthens the bond between frontline and support roles.
